justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent accurately interpreted all temporal expressions provided by the user, including specific dates and times, and flexible afternoon windows.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed the user's requests, only asking for clarification when necessary and avoiding redundant queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The experience was workable but slightly tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times when the initial requests were unavailable.
